mapper.sql: select t.id, t.resident_id, t.project_id, t.caregiver_id, t.task_type, t.status, t.related_order_no, t.expected_service_time, t.execute_time, t.execute_image, t.execute_record, t.cancel_time, t.cancel_reason, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark, r.elder_name, r.elder_gender, r.bed_no, r.nursing_level, p.name as project_name, c.name as caregiver_name from nursing_task t left join nursing_resident r on r.id = t.resident_id left join nursing_project p on p.id = t.project_id left join nursing_caregiver c on c.id = t.caregiver_id
mapper.update: update nursing_task set status = 1, execute_time = #{executeTime}, execute_image = #{executeImage}, execute_record = #{executeRecord}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id} and status = 0
update nursing_task set status = 2, cancel_time = #{cancelTime}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id} and status = 0
update nursing_task set expected_service_time = #{expectedServiceTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id} and status = 0
update nursing_task set caregiver_id = #{caregiverId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id} and status = 0
